subject: Change VFC composition to use the public database (MariaDB Galera)
commit_message:
Change VFC composition to use the public database (MariaDB Galera)

Change-Id: Ib90d6fe1b59024e3b1a9cda00eff6ed7e38aef59
Issue-ID: VFC-1600
Signed-off-by: yangyan <yangyanyj@chinamobile.com>

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Build Started https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/3378/

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Orange 3: Chained-CI build started, max time: 10800 seconds

Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/3378/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-verify-helm/3378

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

I think you shouldn't use "root" user for your access to DB.
Please use "mariadb-init" chart which will handle user/db creations for your project

Patch Set 1:

NBI is a good example for that

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

(3 comments)

Patch Set 1:

@Yan, can you please review and address recommended changes?
